name: Pizzaburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger. Add tomato sauce and seasonings. Simmer until thick.
2. Cool mixture. Stir in chopped stuffed green olives and cubed mozzarella cheese.
3. Spread filling evenly on hamburger buns.
4. Wrap each bun tightly in foil or saran wrap.
5. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Reheat in microwave or oven before serving.
Makes 14 to 16 buns.
